title: Consumer Goroutines, Cancellation, and Shutdown · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs consumer goroutines, cancellation, and shutdown from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a leak-resistant Go consumer lifecycle state machine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Report ready only after connection, topology, channel, prefetch, consume registration, and required dependencies are ready; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Treat a closed delivery channel and consumer-cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Consume Registration Readiness · changed case · Review Consume Registration Readine…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 1099 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then lower the byte and goroutine budget and preserve rejection evidence. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Shutdown Ack Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Go messaging team handles case 4528 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Shutdown Ack Policy.
steps.why: Retrieving Shutdown Ack Policy through the concrete a leak-resistant Go consumer lifecycle state machine case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Shutdown Ack Policy, keep Shutdown Ack Policy connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Shutdown Ack Policy, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Shutdown Ack Policy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Shutdown Ack Policy, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review Go messaging team handles case 4528 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to sequence consumer readiness, cancellation, handler draining, deadline, and close; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose acknowledgement, requeue, dead-letter, or channel-close behavior for in-flight work during graceful and forced shutdown; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Shutdown Ack Policy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Acknowledging every in-flight message during shutdown prevents both loss and duplicates. In Go, closing a context automatically waits for every handler and acknowledgement to finish.
